title: Incorrect aggregation logic
mock_patch:
diff --git a/solution.py b/solution.py
--- a/solution.py
+++ b/solution.py
@@ -1,18 +1,18 @@
 """Buggy sales aggregation."""
 
 from typing import TypedDict
 
 
 class Sale(TypedDict):
     """One sale record."""
 
     category: str
     amount: int
 
 
 def total_by_category(sales: list[Sale]) -> dict[str, int]:
     """Return total amount by category."""
     totals: dict[str, int] = {}
     for sale in sales:
-        totals[sale["category"]] = sale["amount"]
+        totals[sale["category"]] = totals.get(sale["category"], 0) + sale["amount"]
     return totals
